source_label: Inspection Record — BNSF ES44DC 7670 — Daily 49 CFR §229.21 — 2026-04-15 (passed)
text: Daily Locomotive Inspection per 49 CFR §229.21. Unit: BNSF ES44DC 7670. Inspector: Bob Carlson. All 26 items pass. Brake pipe leakage 1.4 psi/min (limit 5.0). Sanders functional, both ends. Horn audible. Alerter resets normally. EPB applies and releases via SDIS. No exceptions. Returned to service 2026-04-15 09:15.

source_label: Inspection Record — BNSF ES44DC 7695 — Daily 49 CFR §229.21 — 2026-04-22 (1 exception)
text: Daily Locomotive Inspection per 49 CFR §229.21. Unit: BNSF ES44DC 7695. Inspector: Tomás Ortiz. 25 of 26 items pass. Exception: rear-end sander discharging intermittently (CFR §229.131). Tagged as non-emergency defect; unit released to service with sander bad-ordered, repair scheduled for next 92-day inspection.
